content.claim: Hungary tracks students significantly earlier than OECD comparators, with approximately 85% of Hungarian students attending schools that select by academic performance or feeder-school recommendations, compared to an OECD average of 43%
content.context: Fresh live research through the Finnish system reform lens
limitations: Data point appears to be from a specific OECD survey year not explicitly identified in notes
The definition of 'selection' may vary across countries in how it is measured
No information provided on trend direction over time in Hungary
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
